rulings.Case Title: IN RE:EST OF DIONISIA TSIROLIAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Reconsideration Of Ruling On Petition For Authority To Terminate Trust And Distribute Assets [Civ. Proc. Code 1008]
rulings.Rulings: Trustee Daniel Byrne's Motion for Reconsideration is DENIED. The Trustee has not presented any "new facts, law, or circumstances" as required under CCP Section 1008 and seeks clarification of the Court's reasons for striking a portion of the October 9, 2015 Order, i.e. the portion that purports to terminate the Dionisia Tsirolias Trust and distribute all assets of the Trust to the "Estate of Irene Denucci, to wit: Successor Trustee Daniel Byrne." The Trustee may contact Probate Examiner Sean Bang at (415) 551-3878 with questions about the October 9 Order.
